goals.title: Safe provider-smoke preflight and bounded smoke evidence
goals.objective:
Safe provider-smoke preflight and bounded smoke evidence
Create/use ignored `config/settings.provider-smoke.local` with broker_mock or fixture portfolio, Telegram disabled/placeholders, market_data.mode real, capped max_universe_size <= 50, cache_dir set, and financial_data.dart_api_key_env set.
Run the smoke-profile preflight guard from the test spec.
Run bounded provider smoke with `env -u AUTOSTOCK_TELEGRAM_BOT_TOKEN -u AUTOSTOCK_TELEGRAM_CHAT_ID`.
Capture sanitized evidence for pykrx/FDR and OpenDART, or explicit blockers if credentials/provider/network are unavailable.
Do not run Google Sheets live read or Telegram live send. Do not print secrets.
goals.evidence: Smoke-safe profile preflight passed; bounded real-mode provider smoke completed with market_data_provider=pykrx, universe source=fdr_universe count=5, telegram_delivery_status=disabled; OpenDART recorded blocker dart_api_key_missing because AUTOSTOCK_DART_API_KEY was absent; evidence saved in .omx/ultragoal/evidence/G001-provider-smoke-summary.md and .json.

goals.title: Korean release documentation update
goals.objective:
Korean release documentation update
Update project docs under `docs/` in Korean with sanitized evidence/blockers.
Clearly distinguish completed OpenDART/pykrx/FDR validation from deferred P1 Google Sheets/Telegram live smoke.
Do not mark v0.2 complete unless evidence supports it or blockers are explicitly documented.
goals.evidence: Korean docs updated: docs/STATUS.md and docs/ROADMAP.md reflect bounded pykrx/FDR provider-smoke evidence, OpenDART dart_api_key_missing blocker, and deferred P1 Google Sheets/Telegram live smoke; docs/qa/PROVIDER_SMOKE_2026-06-03.md records sanitized commands, warnings, results, and next actions.

goals.title: Verification, final quality gate, and scoped commit
goals.objective:
Verification, final quality gate, and scoped commit
Run `python3 -m pytest`.
Run staged forbidden-path guard and non-printing secret-safety scan.
Ensure no generated `data/`, `config/*.local*`, credential JSON, token, or local settings file is committed.
Run final ai-slop-cleaner no-op/changed-file pass and independent code-review gate required by Ultragoal.
Commit only intended tracked docs/planning changes with Conventional Commit + Lore trailers.
goals.evidence: Final verification and quality gate passed: git diff checks clean, python3 -m pytest reported 61 passed, staged forbidden-path guard and non-printing secret scan passed, local smoke profile/generated data remained ignored, ai-slop-cleaner no-op/changed-file pass recorded, independent code-reviewer APPROVE and architect CLEAR evidence recorded. Scoped commit to follow with intended docs/.omx artifacts only.

codexObjective: Complete the durable ultragoal plan in .omx/ultragoal/goals.json, including later accepted/appended stories, under the original brief constraints; use .omx/ultragoal/ledger.jsonl as the audit trail.
